title: RV & Marine Locksmith in Hot Springs, AR | Arkey Lock
metaDesc: Locked out of your camper or boat near the lakes? Arkey Locksmith handles RV doors, storage bays & marine keys across Hot Springs. Call (501) 617-8872.
h1: RV & Marine Locksmith Serving Hot Springs & Lake Country
heroSub: Most locksmiths skip RVs and boats. We don’t. From camper lockouts to marine compartment keys, our mobile team comes right to your campsite, driveway, or dock.

sections.html:
The Locksmith Who Actually Works on RVs & Boats

Call around Hot Springs and you’ll hear the same thing from most shops: “Sorry, we don’t do RVs or boats.” That’s frustrating when you’re standing next to a locked camper at a campground or a boat with a missing ignition key at the marina. Arkey Locksmith is different. We took the time to learn these locks, and we keep the tools and key blanks to handle them.

We live and work in lake country. Lake Ouachita, Lake Hamilton, and DeGray Lake bring campers, fifth-wheels, and boats through here all season long. When something locks up out on the water or at the campsite, you need someone who knows the difference between a travel-trailer door lock and a marine hatch latch. We do.

RV & Camper Lock Services

RVs have more locks than most people realize. There’s the main entry door, plus a row of outside storage bays, and sometimes a separate lock for the fuel or battery compartment. We service all of them.

Door & Entry Locks

Locked out of your motorhome or travel trailer? We open the door without damage and cut a fresh key on the spot if yours is lost.

Storage & Bay Locks

Those outside compartment locks all use the same key when set up right. We can rekey them to match or make new keys when one goes missing.

Lost Key Replacement

No spare and no key at all? We can read the lock and make a working key, so you’re not stuck waiting on a part from out of state.

Boat & Marine Lock Help

A boat with a dead or missing ignition key isn’t going anywhere. We cut and program boat ignition keys for many makes, so you can get back on Lake Hamilton or Ouachita instead of leaving your boat tied up. We also work on the locks that keep your gear safe.

  • Boat ignition key cutting and programming
  • Marine compartment and locker locks
  • Hatch and storage latch keys
  • Cabin door locks on larger boats
  • Replacement keys when the only one is lost overboard

Bring the boat to us or we’ll meet you at the ramp, the marina, or wherever it’s parked on the trailer. We’re fully mobile, so the lock comes to us only if that’s easiest for you.

We Come to the Campground or Dock

You don’t have to unhook the trailer or haul the boat anywhere. We’re a fully mobile, locally owned crew based right here in Hot Springs. That means a real local tech answers and shows up, not a national call center routing you to whoever’s closest.

We’re available 24/7, because lockouts don’t wait for business hours. Licensed and insured, with 15 years of experience, and we offer discounts for veterans and seniors. Just call (501) 617-8872 and tell us where you’re parked.

faqs.q: Can you make a new key for my RV or camper?
faqs.a: Yes. We can cut new keys for RV entry doors and storage compartments, even when you have no working key to copy. We read the lock and make a key that fits, so you’re not waiting weeks on a mail-order part.

faqs.q: I’m locked out of my camper at a campground. Can you help?
faqs.a: Absolutely. Camper and motorhome lockouts are one of our specialties. We open the door without damaging it and can make you a spare key right there so it doesn’t happen again. We’re available 24/7.

faqs.q: Do you make boat ignition keys?
faqs.a: We do. We cut and, where needed, program boat ignition keys for many common makes. If your only key went overboard, give us a call at (501) 617-8872 and we’ll get you running again.

faqs.q: Can you rekey my RV’s storage and compartment locks?
faqs.a: Yes. Those outside bay locks can usually be set to all work off one key. We rekey them to match and make extra keys, so you carry one key instead of a handful.

faqs.q: Will you come to the marina or dock?
faqs.a: We will. We’re fully mobile and serve the marinas, ramps, and campgrounds around Lake Ouachita, Lake Hamilton, and DeGray Lake. Tell us where your boat or RV is and we’ll come to you.

faqs.q: How much does RV or boat key work cost?
faqs.a: It varies by the lock and key type, but our pricing is affordable and far less than going through a dealership. Call us for a quick quote before we head out.

keywords: RV locksmith Hot Springs, marine locksmith, boat key, camper lockout, RV door lock, storage bay lock, lake locksmith
